zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto Count von Tecklenburg於1185年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 特可倫波格時，他的父親Simon I. Graf von Tecklenburg47歲，母親Oda von Berg-Altena und von Hoevel32歲。他和Mechthild von Holstein de holland至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1263年9月11日享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so called in North Rhine-Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: Count
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earl
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto Count von Tecklenburg was born in 1185, in Tecklenburg, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany, his father, Simon I. Graf von Tecklenburg, was 47 and his mother, Oda von Berg-Altena und von Hoevel, was 32. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Mechthild von Holstein de holland. He died on 11 September 1263, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto Count von Tecklenburg est né en 1185, à Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Simon I. Graf von Tecklenburg, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Oda von Berg-Altena und von Hoevel, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Mechthild von Holstein de holland. Il est décédé le 11 septembre 1263, à l’âge de 78 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto Count von Tecklenburg è nato il nel 1185 nel Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Simon I. Graf von Tecklenburg, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Oda von Berg-Altena und von Hoevel, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Mechthild von Holstein de holland. Morì il 11 settembre 1263, all'età di 78 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Otto Count von Tecklenburg(이)가 1185년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 테클렌버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon I. Graf von Tecklenburg(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Oda von Berg-Altena und von Hoevel(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Mechthild von Holstein de holland(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 9월 11일 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto Count von Tecklenburg nasceu em 1185, em Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Simon I. Graf von Tecklenburg, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Oda von Berg-Altena und von Hoevel, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Mechthild von Holstein de holland. Ele faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1263, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto Count von Tecklenburg родился в 1185 г. в местности крис теккленбург, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Simon I. Graf von Tecklenburg было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Oda von Berg-Altena und von Hoevel, 32. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Mechthild von Holstein de holland. Он умер 11 сентября 1263 г. в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto Count von Tecklenburg nació en 1185, en Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Simon I. Graf von Tecklenburg, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Oda von Berg-Altena und von Hoevel, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Mechthild von Holstein de holland. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1263, a la edad de 78 años.
